preToolUse.script: if ($env:TOOL_INPUT -match 'push\s+--force|reset\s+--hard|clean\s+-f|branch\s+-D') { Write-Output 'BLOCK: Destructive git operation requires explicit user confirmation.'; exit 1 }
if ($env:FILE_PATH -match 'node_modules[\\/]') { Write-Output 'BLOCK: Cannot modify node_modules.'; exit 1 }
if ($env:FILE_PATH -match '^\.env') { Write-Output 'BLOCK: Direct .env modification blocked. Use environment variables or ask user.'; exit 1 }
